**Package Structure:**
```
psyforge/
├── packages/
│   ├── timing/          # Existing - High-precision clock
│   ├── scheduling/      # Existing - Hierarchical scheduler  
│   ├── devices/         # Existing - Device abstraction layer
│   ├── forgescript/     # Existing - ForgeScript language

├── apps/
│   ├── web/             # Main web application
│   ├── docs/            # Documentation site
│   └── playground/      # ForgeScript playground
├── tools/
│   ├── scripts/         # Build and deployment scripts
│   └── generators/      # Nx generators for new packages
├── nx.json
├── package.json
└── tsconfig.base.json
```

**CI/CD Pipeline:**
```yaml
# GitHub Actions workflow
- Lint and format check
- Type checking across all packages
- Unit and integration tests
- E2E tests for critical paths
- Security scanning (CodeQL, SAST)
- Performance regression tests
- Build all packages and applications
- Generate and publish documentation
- Deploy to development environment

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  NX_CLOUD_DISTRIBUTED_EXECUTION: false

jobs:
  setup:
    name: Setup & Cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      nx-cache-key: ${{ steps.nx-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Cache Nx workspace
        id: nx-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-nx-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

  lint-and-format:
    name: Lint & Format Check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Check Prettier formatting
        run: npm run format:check

  typecheck:
    name: TypeScript Type Check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run TypeScript type checking
        run: npm run typecheck

  test:
    name: Unit & Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: ['18', '20', '22']
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests with coverage
        run: npm run test:ci

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        if: matrix.node-version == '20'
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          directory: ./coverage
          fail_ci_if_error: true
          verbose: true

  build:
    name: Build All Packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [lint-and-format, typecheck, test]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build all packages
        run: npm run build:all

      - name: Cache build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: setup
    permissions:
      actions: read
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run npm audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level moderate

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with:
          languages: javascript-typescript

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3

  performance-tests:
    name: Performance Regression Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore Nx cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .nx/cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-nx-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('nx.json') }}

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run timing precision tests
        run: |
          echo "Running timing precision validation..."
          # TODO: Add actual performance regression tests
          # npm run test:performance

  deploy-dev:
    name: Deploy to Development
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: development
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            packages/*/dist
            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Deploy to development environment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to development environment..."
          # TODO: Add actual deployment commands
          # npm run deploy:dev

  release:
    name: Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |

            apps/*/dist
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Create Release
        run: |
          echo "Creating release..."

          # npm run release

## Key Achievements

### Technical Architecture Foundation
✅ **Architecture Planning**: Established comprehensive technical roadmap with:
- Technical architecture decisions documented and validated
- Sprint-based development methodology with quality gates
- Performance targets and acceptance criteria defined
- Modular package structure for runtime independence

### Development Framework Establishment

- Gemini Pro approval for architecture, code quality, performance
- O3 approval for technical implementation, algorithms, edge cases
- No sprint advancement without both approvals
- Comprehensive testing and documentation requirements

### Technical Foundation
✅ **Architecture Decisions**: Key technical choices documented:
- TypeScript fluent API instead of custom DSL (major risk reduction)

### Technical Insights
- **Risk Reduction**: Leveraging existing ecosystems (TypeScript) vs building custom solutions

- **Quality Gates**: Mandatory audits prevent technical debt accumulation

- **Documentation First**: Comprehensive planning accelerates development and prevents scope creep
- **Accessibility Foundation**: WCAG compliance from day one, not retrofitted later
- **Performance Budgets**: Specific timing targets ensure precision requirements aren't compromised

  - Response collection with DeviceManager integration and precise timing
  - Experiment serialization to/from JSON with validation and migration support
  - Runtime capability detection and graceful degradation
  - Comprehensive validation system with accessibility and performance checks
  - Example experiments demonstrating real-world usage patterns
- **Package Structure**:
  ```
  packages/forgescript/
  ├── src/
  │   ├── core/ (Timeline, Event, Experiment, Runtime)
  │   ├── stimuli/ (Text, Image, Audio, Video)
  │   ├── responses/ (Keyboard, Mouse, Touch)
  │   ├── serialization/ (Serializer, Validator)
  │   └── index.ts (Main API exports)
  ├── tests/ (Comprehensive test suite)
  ├── examples/ (Stroop task, Simple RT)
  └── package.json
  ```
- **API Example**:
  ```typescript
  const experiment = ForgeScript.createExperiment('My Study')
    .timeline([
      ForgeScript.createTimeline('welcome')
        .add(ForgeScript.createTextStimulus('Welcome!', 2000))
        .add(ForgeScript.createKeyboardResponse(['space'])),
      ForgeScript.createTimeline('trials')
        .repeat(10)
        .randomize()
        .add(ForgeScript.createTextStimulus('Target', 1000))
        .add(ForgeScript.createKeyboardResponse(['f', 'j'], 5000))
    ]);
  
  await ForgeScript.runExperiment(experiment, 'participant_001');
  ```
- **Notes**: 
  - Foundation language for all experiments complete - TypeScript fluent API is intuitive yet powerful
  - All acceptance criteria from next.md fulfilled including serialization, validation, and examples
